_header.file_role: E2 anchors fragment (plan section 1.3 schema + ci_covered) for the orchestrator's anchors.json assembly: 3 observed T2 training-loss anchors + 1 dropped (no official observation)

provenance.source: Ai2 official WandB project ai2-llm/OLMo-2-1124-7B, run uwjy7cji (OLMo-2-1124-7B-stage-1-run-11): train/CrossEntropyLoss at final step 928646 (= 3.895e12 tokens at GBS 1024 x 4096). Reached via the OLMo-2 paper (arXiv:2501.00656) 'WandB Logs' footnote https://api.wandb.ai/links/ai2-llm/fjn0v0ec. https://wandb.ai/ai2-llm/OLMo-2-1124-7B/runs/uwjy7cji

observed_notes.measurement: last logged train/CrossEntropyLoss of the final stage-1 segment; Z-loss logged separately (weight 1e-5, final 2.6e-4, not included)
observed_notes.token_basis_caveat: anchor tokens 4.0e12 (model card '4 Trillion'); paper: 3.9T stage-1 + 3x50B stage-2 on Dolmino mix with final soup. Observation taken at stage-1 endpoint 3.895e12 (same training distribution); stage-2/soup not a single training-distribution loss
observed_notes.figure_trap: paper Figure 2 shows OLMo 2 curve only to ~2.5e12 tokens (x-axis aligned with OLMo-0424); not the endpoint

provenance.source: EleutherAI official WandB project eleutherai/pythia (linked from EleutherAI/pythia README line 73), run vd5ogsc6: train/lm_loss of final checkpoint (step 143000 = 299,892,736,000 tokens, /fsx/pile standard, bs1024). https://wandb.ai/eleutherai/pythia/runs/vd5ogsc6

observed_notes.measurement: official eval run on final checkpoint; train/valid/test trio 1.977952 / 1.960450 / 1.966468
observed_notes.corroboration: run 3bj0rp1k (bs512 replication, 286000 steps x 512 x 2048 = same 299.9B tokens): train/lm_loss 1.965073; spread vs primary 0.013
observed_notes.anti_cherry_pick: selected from a full 42-run scan of the project carrying final loss trios; deduped (2.039912), non-1024-batch and early-stop variants excluded; scan at validation/e2_quality/observed/pythia_eval_sweep_scan.json

provenance.source: EleutherAI official WandB project eleutherai/pythia, run kg5ni1dl: train/lm_loss of final checkpoint (step 143000 = 299,892,736,000 tokens, /fsx/pile standard, bs1024). https://wandb.ai/eleutherai/pythia/runs/kg5ni1dl

observed_notes.measurement: official eval run on final checkpoint; train/valid/test trio 1.757044 / 1.741183 / 1.741121
observed_notes.corroboration: independent eval run 3hssg7up: train/lm_loss 1.757780 (spread 7e-4); mid-run training segments (steps 1.24e5-1.26e5) show 1.73-1.78, consistent trajectory

observed_notes.drop_reason: no official final training loss number and no official full-run (11.2e12-token) loss curve published as of 2026-07-17; checked: HF blog smollm3 (no loss figure/number; promises future logs), model cards SmolLM3-3B/-3B-Base, SmolLM3-3B-checkpoints (weights only), huggingface/smollm repo (configs only), Smol Training Playbook + public chart data (ablation curves <= 1.0e11 tokens only), WandB public probes (none), HF dataset search (no logs released)
observed_notes.partial_reference: official main-run curve for first 7.24e11 tokens only (run elie-48n-1004-part1, GBS 2.36M matches SmolLM3): end-of-segment lm_loss ~2.24-2.28, trajectory reference only, not an anchor observation; saved at validation/e2_quality/observed/smollm3_mainrun_first_724B_tokens_loss.csv
observed_notes.blocker: training logs announced but not released as of 2026-07-17; re-check on release
